calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Dec-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mario Paolini for Esther Franco.

Mr. Paolini addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes regarding time entries, time spent in opening and closing the estate, fees and explained difficulty in obtaining schedules from the stock broker. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
